name: grep
label: grep
description: Search file contents by regex using rg -n.
promptGuidelines: Use grep for fast content search when you know text or a regex to find.

path.description: Directory or file to search in. If omitted, the current working directory is used as a default.

limit.description: Maximum number of matching lines to return. If omitted, defaults to {{defaultLimit}}.

limitPerFile.description: Maximum number of matching lines to return per file.{{limitPerFileDefault}}

maxCharsPerMatch.description: Maximum number of chars per match. If omitted, defaults to {{defaultMaxCharsPerMatch}}.
